_trn_adbanner.snapshot_text:
This is a Nokiatis Launcher snapshot release.
This means that it is highly unstable and contains potentially disruptive bugs. It also does not have auto updates.
_trn_adbanner.beta_text:
This is a Nokiatis Launcher beta release.
This means that it might contain some bugs but it should be mostly stable.
_trn_adbanner.alpha_text:
This is a Nokiatis Launcher alpha release.
This means that it is unstable and contains many bugs.
_trn_paragraph-1: At Nokiatis Launcher, we strive to provide a high-quality user-experience, which involves ongoing development and maintenance costs. To support these efforts, our platform features ads.
_trn_paragraph-2-list-element-1: Minecraft is an ever-evolving game with frequent updates and new features, requiring us to continuously adapt and update Nokiatis Launcher to keep pace.
_trn_paragraph-2-list-element-2: Constant updates ensure compatibility with the latest Minecraft versions and modding community developments.
_trn_paragraph-2-list-element-3: We aim to continuously enhance functionality and user experience in response to community feedback and technological advancements.
_trn_paragraph-3: Additionally, the revenue from ads enables us to:
_trn_paragraph-3-list-element-1: Support our team of dedicated developers and staff.
_trn_paragraph-3-list-element-2: Research new features and innovate for the best user experience.
_trn_paragraph-3-list-element-3: Allow key team members to work full-time on Nokiatis Launcher.
_trn_paragraph-4: In our commitment to transparency, it's important to note that we receive only 35% of the ad revenue. The rest is shared with Overwolf, as repayment for their funding support, and with authors from CurseForge
_trn_paragraph-5: While ads support the free version of our app, we also offer optional subscriptions for those who prefer an ad-free experience. These subscriptions help fund our operations while providing an alternative for users who wish to remove ads.
_trn_paragraph-6: We don't have direct control over what ads are displayed, but we try to make the experience as unobtrusive as possible, ensuring ads don't disrupt the experience.
_trn_paragraph-7: Thank you for being part of our journey. Your support is instrumental in shaping the future of Nokiatis Launcher and enhancing the Minecraft experience for everyone in our community.
